Package com.linkedin.alpini.base.misc

Class Msg

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.linkedin.alpini.base.misc.Msg
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.util.function.Supplier<java.lang.Object>, org.apache.logging.log4j.util.StringBuilderFormattable
    public final class Msg
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.util.function.Supplier<java.lang.Object>, org.apache.logging.log4j.util.StringBuilderFormattable
    Message holder object for use with lazy logging.
